title: Elbaf’s Crisis Converges
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Children, Unknown person #11, Giants, Nami, Unknown person #12 as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'm dying to go home already, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you have any more bidding for me to attend to first?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Weren't the Dream Demons meant to stop them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: It's my mom and the others!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: From this Nika?! Don't be Silly!!

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: We come from a generation of Warriors!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We won't make it even if we sprint.

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 30 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
